1.name: Tacos Al Pastor
1.description: Corn tortillas filled with marinated pork, pineapple, onions and fresh cilantro.

2.name: Burrito Supreme
2.description: Large flour tortilla filled with ground beef, rice, black beans, cheese, sour cream and guacamole.

3.name: Enchiladas Verdes
3.description: Corn tortillas stuffed with chicken, topped with green tomatillo sauce and baked with cheese.

4.name: Quesadillas
4.description: Folded tortilla filled with melted cheese, with chicken or beef option, served with salsa.

5.name: Guacamole & Chips
5.description: Fresh mashed avocados with onions, tomatoes, jalapeños and lime, served with crispy corn chips.

6.name: Chocolate Churros
6.description: Fried doughnuts sprinkled with sugar and cinnamon, accompanied by a rich hot chocolate sauce.
